ppose the star occupied at the time by the Sun happens to be
the Vedha not for the natal star but for the Adhana star i.e. the
19th one from the natal star, then the effect would be fear and
anxiety . Let us suppose your natal star to be Mrgasiras. Then
its Vedha is Uttarasadha. If the Sun is transiting Uttarasadha.
you have to think that there is danger to life. On the other
hand, if the Sun is passing through not Uttarasadha bot through
Visakha, which is the Vedha for the star that is 19th from the
natal star viz. Dhanistha (it becomes the Adhana), there will

Vedha for Karma-star i.e. 10th from the natal one, there will be
